Set.Info: XML 文件列表 — 选择要编辑的 XML 配置文件
XML File List — Select XML config file to edit

Set.Name: loadData

Set.Info: 模板列表 — 选择要编辑的 EasyWebTemplate
Template List — Select EasyWebTemplate to edit

Set.Top:
当前 XML: @XML_PATH  |  返回 XML 列表
操作:   请先在下方选择一个模板

Set.Name: OnPageLoad SQL
Set.Sql: SELECT '@XML_PATH' AS xml_path, '@ITEM_NAME' AS item_name, '1' AS initialized

Set.Info: XItem 列表 — 管理表单元素

Set.Top: XML: @XML_PATH  |  模板: @ITEM_NAME  |  返回模板列表
XML: @XML_PATH | 模板: @ITEM_NAME | XItem: @XITEM_NAME  |  返回列表

Set.Name: OnPageLoad SQL
Set.Sql: SELECT '@XML_PATH' AS xml_path, '@ITEM_NAME' AS item_name, '@XITEM_NAME' AS xitem_name, '@XITEM_NAME' AS OLD_XITEM_NAME, '' AS TAG, '' AS DESC_ZH, '' AS DESC_EN, '' AS DATA_FIELD, 'String' AS DATA_TYPE, '' AS IS_ENCRYPT, '' AS VALID, '' AS FORMAT, '' AS IS_MUST_INPUT, '' AS MAX_LENGTH, '' AS MIN_LENGTH, '' AS MAX_VALUE, '' AS MIN_VALUE, '' AS IS_ORDER, '' AS SEARCH_TYPE, '' AS ORDER_EXP, '' AS STYLE, '' AS PARENT_STYLE, '' AS XSTYLE, '' AS EVENT_NAME, '' AS EVENT_TYPE, '' AS EVENT_VALUE, '' AS CALL_ACTION, '' AS CONFIRM_INFO, '' AS LIST_SQL, '' AS LIST_VALUE_LIST, '' AS LIST_DISPLAY_LIST, '' AS USER_SET

Set.Name: saveXItem
Set.Sql: -- XItem 保存由后端 UpdateCfgAction 处理 -- 通过 Ajax POST 到 method=saveXItem

Set.DisplayList: 文本,密码,文本显示,下拉框,多选下拉,多行文本,编辑器,提交按钮,普通按钮,复选框,单选框,隐藏域,H5上传,短信验证,日期,日期范围,文件,图片,标签
字符串,整数,长整型,双精度,日期,布尔,二进制
包含,左包含,右包含,等于

Set.Top: XML: @XML_PATH | 模板: @ITEM_NAME  |  返回模板列表
XML: @XML_PATH | 模板: @ITEM_NAME | SQL: @SQL_NAME  |  返回列表

Set.Name: OnPageLoad SQL
Set.Sql: SELECT '@XML_PATH' AS xml_path, '@ITEM_NAME' AS item_name, '@SQL_NAME' AS sql_name, '' AS SQL_TYPE, 'update' AS TRANS_TYPE

Set.Top: XML: @XML_PATH | 模板: @ITEM_NAME | Script: @SCRIPT_NAME  |  返回列表

Set.Name: OnPageLoad SQL
Set.Sql: SELECT '@XML_PATH' AS xml_path, '@ITEM_NAME' AS item_name, '@SCRIPT_NAME' AS script_name, 'javascript' AS SCRIPT_TYPE
